# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  service-1:
    url: http://service1.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service1
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
  service-2:
    url: http://service2.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service2
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 15

upstreams:
  upstream-1:
    type: roundrobin
    targets:
      - target: service1.example.com
        weight: 1
  upstream-2:
    type: roundrobin
    targets:
      - target: service2.example.com
        weight: 1
